title: Early Beginnings
caption: New fellows gather with the old for a night of social callings.

title: The Master Sorcerer

title: Hespir Everwyern
caption: A pyromancer of the Sunfury under Kael'thas, Hespir was one of the youngest soldiers defending Quel'Thalas after its fall; he still carries on even today. Art by Mira Sands.

title: Sinara Cinderfall
caption: Once a prominent member of the Sunreavers, the magus now serves the kingdom of Quel'Thalas directly as one of its magisters. Art by

title: Ascension Conclave
caption: The Fellowship, gathering in full for the first time since the crisis during the Purge of Dalaran, convenes to welcome new fellows en mass, marking a new turn of fortune for the ever dwindling membership which was nearly wiped out completely during the Fall of Quel'Thalas.

title: The Hitch in the Highlands
caption: The Fellowship is urgently dispatched to aid one of their fellows investigating the Twilight Cult in the Highlands, leading them into the lightless depths of an old dragon lair where, upon carving their way through wards and inquiries with no answers, they discover the cultists to be excavating and transporting away the bones of Obsidia, one of the last Black Dragons to bear a clutch during the Cataclysm.

title: Quiet Threads

title: The Void Rift
caption: Fellows of the order delve into the void rift where Portal Keeper Sylas had been fought previously, and uncover startling truths about the rising tides of darkness. Narrowly escaping with their lives, the fellows prepare their next steps to battle back the shadows.
